product: Excel file format support is now available by default
tagline: Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces.
what_it_does: Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces. You can ingest, parse, and query .xls, .xlsx, and .xlsm files directly using built in support, without external libraries or manual conversions. Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces.
